mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards ( title, content, writer, member_id ) VALUES ( #{request.title}, #{request.content}, (SELECT nickname FROM members WHERE id = #{memberId}), #{memberId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.member_id, b.title, b.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) AS writer, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM boards b LEFT JOIN members m ON b.member_id = m.id
b.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( b.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards b LEFT JOIN members m ON b.member_id = m.id
b.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( b.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT b.id, b.member_id, b.title, b.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) AS writer, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM boards b LEFT JOIN members m ON b.member_id = m.id ORDER BY b.view_count DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.id, b.member_id, b.title, b.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) AS writer, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM boards b LEFT JOIN members m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT b.id, b.member_id, b.title, b.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, b.writer) AS writer, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM boards b LEFT JOIN members m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET title = #{request.title}, content = #{request.content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
